insight: Setting a boss alias to "hidden" only suppresses the vanilla Bukkit custom-name. For Citizens-managed bosses (Citizens.Enabled: true), Citizens controls the nameplate via its own NPC.Metadata.NAMEPLATE_VISIBLE flag and overwrites Bukkit's custom-name on every packet refresh — so the nameplate stays visible unless Boss also toggles that metadata. Fixed by setting NAMEPLATE_VISIBLE=false when alias equals "hidden" in BossAI.applyCitizensSettings.
